text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/dcc-dccd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/138271 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>   

Yes, I approve this patch which I have just submitted.  It is an 
excellent patch and I am pleased to endorse it.  ;-)

(I used the wrong submission email, didn't I?  Oh, well.  Sorry.)


Craig.
